## How to test

- [ ] Open `index.html`, walk the affected slide(s) manually
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] If a new key binding, slide builder, or config option, the README +
      `types.d.ts` + `presentations/examples/` + `tests/` were all updated
